Have you gotten used to piloting the
AIS Vega? Then let's start the timer.

Please defeat all the targets that appear!
Ready, set... Go!

- Ascend with <%Jump> and descend with
<%PhotonArts> from the Back Palette
- After sidestepping, press in any direction
to move quickly

- Ascend with <%Jump> and descend with
<%MainPaletteC> from the Back Palette
- After sidestepping, press in any direction
to move quickly

- Press <%NormalAttack> to attack with the gun
- Press <%PhotonArts> to attack with the sword

- Press <%NormalAttack> to attack with the gun
- Press <%PhotonArts> to attack with the sword

Activating the barrier: Press and hold the skill
icon on the Sub-Palette. If you are attacked
while it is activated, releasing the button
will perform a counterattack.

Activating the barrier: Press and hold
<%WeaponAction_2> + <%PhotonArts>. If you
are attacked while it is activated, releasing
the buttons will perform a counterattack.

- Hold <%NormalAttack> from the Back Palette
to lock on to targets. Afterwards, release the
button to attack the locked-on targets.

- Hold <%WeaponAction_2> + <%PhotonArts>
to lock on to targets. Afterwards, release the
buttons to attack the locked-on targets.
